name: Lovingly Rough Kiss
descrip: Roughly make out. Can lower defence, and has a high chance to crit.
outcome: [AttackerName]'s tongue roughly invades [TargetName]'s mouth, dominantly entangling [TargetHisOrHer] tongue as [AttackerHeOrShe] passionately kisses [TargetHimOrHer]!
miss: [AttackerName]'s tongue roughly invades [TargetName]'s mouth, dominantly entangling [TargetHisOrHer] tongue as [AttackerHeOrShe] passionately kisses [TargetHimOrHer], but [TargetName] manages to endure the intense kiss!
statusOutcome: [TargetName]'s is left dazed and vulnerable from the intense kiss!
